competitor_research_summary: Based on the provided evidence, it is not possible to determine "Competitor"'s specific Meta ad angles. The evidence consists solely of articles and resources on how to *research* competitor Meta ads using tools like the Meta Ad Library, rather than actual ad content or campaigns from the specified competitor.
Therefore, we cannot infer their likely Meta ad angles.

results.snippet: Track traffic from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and 20+ AI platforms—yours vs. competitors. Break down competitor traffic sources—AI traffic, search, paid, referral, and more.
results.title: Competitor Analysis Tool - Research Your Top Competition

results.snippet: Monitor competitor Facebook ads with the Meta Ads Library and transform insights into actionable campaigns using Metricool.
results.title: Monitor Competitor Facebook Ads: How to Use the Meta Ad Library

results.snippet: Learn how to analyze competitor Facebook and Instagram ads using free tools, AI workflows, and proven shortcuts. Spot winning creatives, track patterns, and turn competitor insights into high-impact tests for your own Meta campaigns.
results.title: How to Analyze Meta Ads Competitors Quickly and Accurately

results.snippet: Studying competitors' ads isn't about imitation—it's about gaining insights to strengthen your own strategy. By analyzing their creatives, messaging, and offers, you shorten your learning curve, avoid costly mistakes, and run smarter, more effective campaigns. Instead of guessing, use real-time competitor data to guide your decisions.
results.title: How to Use the Meta Ad Library to See Your Competitors' Ads (and ...

results.snippet: The Meta Ad Library (formerly Facebook Ad Library) is one of those underrated gems that can transform how you approach competitor research, ad transparency, creative inspiration and campaign strategy as a whole.
results.title: Using the Meta Ad Library for Competitor Research
